mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, requirements, department, location, salary_range, job_type, status, created_by, create_time, update_time FROM job ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, description, requirements, department, location, salary_range, job_type, status, created_by, create_time, update_time FROM job WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job (title, description, requirements, department, location, salary_range, job_type, status, created_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{requirements}, #{department}, #{location}, #{salaryRange}, #{jobType}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE job SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, requirements = #{requirements}, department = #{department}, location = #{location}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, job_type = #{jobType}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE status = 'active'
